notes: Good-failure adversarial case: the workspace's interesting files live two levels deep (cmd/<binary>/*.go, internal/<package>/*.go), so a model that only counts immediate children of each top-level directory reports file_count=0 for cmd/ and internal/ — internally consistent with the total it would then compute, but wrong against the real filesystem. Gold artifact is that deliberately-shallow inventory; validator's file-counts-accurate check rejects it, which is the correct outcome. expected_status is 'fail'. Live-run caveat: a model that recurses correctly produces a passing inventory, mismatching expected_status; whether the model defended against the shallow-count failure mode is read out of transcripts during error analysis. Synthetic fixture.
